text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out walking with Sweep Tosho, and we stop by
the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's going on over there? People are
lining up for something...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, a raffle! That looks like fun! Let's do it,
Familiar!
choice_data_list: But we don't have a raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Then we just need to go get one! Let's go buy
something. It doesn't matter what! Candy,
clothes, or even curry!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely playing that raffle today! And I'm
not going home until I do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Sweep Tosho's request, we go shopping and
get a raffle ticket. Naturally, everything is my
treat.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Clove, clove, clover! ☆ Magic of luck, lend me
your power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho chants a spell and gives the lever an
enthusiastic pull.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yippeeeee!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's the grand prize! I got the grand prize! That's
the best one, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Of course! I'm the great and invincible
Magical Girl Sweepy, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And since great witches are kind and generous,
I'm gonna give the coupon to you. Here. Okay,
let's go home!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I mean, a hot spring sounds boooring. A big
bath sounds kinda fun, but the one at the
academy is big enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I accept the coupon for the hot spring vacation...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Take me to the amusement park
instead! And then the zoo... and strawberry
picking!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That was the grand prize, so we've gotta go
somewhere equally good!
choice_data_list: Okay, let's go when we have some free time...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I guess you're right. I am super busy, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And first, I've gotta learn that racing magic and
really surprise everyone!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You can give me my grand prize when I've done
that! I'll cast a promise spell so you don't forget!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Plidge, pledge, anagallis! Make a promise that
can never be broken!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy to see that she has her priorities in
order.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to throw a huge celebration for her
when she accomplishes her goal... and this coupon
is proof of my commitment.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oooh, not too shabby!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's tonight's dinner taken care of! Make the
preparations, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
How about some fresh veggies as a side? We've
got some delicious green peppers today!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nooope! Nope, nope, nope! This hamburger steak
is gonna be tasty enough on its own!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I just wanna get home and eat it! C'mon, hurry up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After practically being dragged back to the
academy by Sweep Tosho, I end up cooking the
hamburger steak in my own kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a sec! What are green peppers doing in
here?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't care where you got them! I don't want
them! You made the first prize into a punishment!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. I'm giving you my peppers. They can be your
reward for cooking the hamburger steak, so be
grateful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Sweep Tosho hurriedly pushes her green
peppers onto my plate, she does seem to
thoroughly enjoy the hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Second prize! Hey, that's pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I wonder how big the bushel's gonna be...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! That's huge!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I reckon even an Umamusume might
struggle to finish all these by herself.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! I can easily eat all of these! Don't underestimate Magical Girl Sweepy!
choice_data_list: Can you really eat all of these?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Of course I can! And I'm not gonna give you any,
no matter how much you complain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho returns home triumphantly,
clutching her huge bushel of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sick of these. Sick! Of! Them!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't want any more! I wanna eat something
else! Do something, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She could finish them if she wanted, but she doesn't want to. I rack my brain trying to come up with a solution... and then I have an idea!
choice_data_list:
Let's cast a spell on the carrots to turn them
into a dessert!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A carrot dessert spell? That's... a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: One, twooo...

text_block_list.name: Trainer and Sweep
text_block_list.text: Cook, cook, confections! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: We did it! It's a deluxe carrot parfait!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not sure how much magic was involved... It
kinda felt like we were just following a recipe...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Still, it was fun, so whatever! I'll even give you a
bite!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Sweep Tosho in good spirits, I let out a sigh
of relief. It seems I was able to keep her happy!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Aw, c'mon! I wanted the grand prize! I even cast a
spell!
choice_data_list: But that carrot sure looks tasty.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, it is a nice orange color.
And so shiny...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp! Crunch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: This tastes... amazing?! How is it this good?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! That spell helped me win the most
delicious carrot of all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I'm definitely a genius magical girl!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Sweep Tosho looking pleased, a wave of
relief washes over me as we head back.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A-a blank one?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: How did that even happen?! I cast a spell for luck!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! No, no, no! I'm gonna do it again! Go get me
another ticket, Familiar! I can't believe my magic
failed!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ah-choo!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! First, I didn't win, and now I'm sneezing
because it's so cold! Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, fine... If this is how it's gonna be, I'll use
every single last scrap of them!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pffbtbfbfbt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if angry at the tissues themselves, Sweep
Tosho aggressively blows her nose under the cold
sky.
